testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should load the main domain without errors
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:16:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should load the main domain without errors
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/ Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/", waiting until "networkidle"
16 | test('should load the main domain without errors', async ({ page }) => { 17 | // Navigate to main domain > 18 | const response = await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 19 | 20 | // Check response status 21 | expect(response.status()).toBeLessThan(400); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:18:35
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-150ff--main-domain-without-errors-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-150ff--main-domain-without-errors-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-150ff--main-domain-without-errors-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should have navigation links
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:37:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should have navigation links
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/ Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/", waiting until "networkidle"
36 | 37 | test('should have navigation links', async ({ page }) => { > 38 | await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 39 | 40 | // Check for common navigation elements 41 | const navLinks = page.locator('nav a, header a, [role="navigation"] a'); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:38:18
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-6de48-hould-have-navigation-links-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should have login button or link
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:47:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Landing Page › should have login button or link
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/ Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/", waiting until "networkidle"
46 | 47 | test('should have login button or link', async ({ page }) => { > 48 | await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 49 | 50 | // Look for login button/link 51 | const loginButton = page.locator('button:has-text("Login"), a:has-text("Login"), button:has-text("Sign In"), a:has-text("Sign In")'); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:48:18
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-409b0-d-have-login-button-or-link-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should navigate to login page
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:58:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should navigate to login page
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/login Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/login", waiting until "networkidle"
57 | test.describe('Login Flow', () => { 58 | test('should navigate to login page', async ({ page }) => { > 59 | await page.goto('/login', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 60 | 61 | // Check for login form elements 62 | const emailInput = page.locator('input[type="email"]'); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:59:18

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should show validation errors for empty form
testcase.error:

Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/login Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/login", waiting until "networkidle"
68 | 69 | test('should show validation errors for empty form', async ({ page }) => { > 70 | await page.goto('/login', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 71 | 72 | // Try to submit empty form 73 | const submitButton = page.locator('button[type="submit"], button:has-text("Login"), button:has-text("Sign In")'); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:70:18

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should reject invalid credentials
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:84:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should reject invalid credentials
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/login Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/login", waiting until "networkidle"
83 | 84 | test('should reject invalid credentials', async ({ page }) => { > 85 | await page.goto('/login', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 86 | 87 | // Fill with invalid credentials 88 | await page.fill('input[type="email"]', 'invalid@test.com'); at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:85:18

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Login Flow › should successfully login with valid credentials

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › API Health › should have working health endpoint
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:191:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › API Health › should have working health endpoint
Error: apiRequestContext.get: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND unlovedproductions.com Call log: - → GET https://unlovedproductions.com/api/health - user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.7827.55 Safari/537.36 - accept: */* - accept-encoding: gzip,deflate,br
190 | test.describe('API Health', () => { 191 | test('should have working health endpoint', async ({ page }) => { > 192 | const response = await page.request.get('/api/health'); | ^ 193 | 194 | expect(response.status()).toBeLessThan(400); 195 | at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:192:43

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Error Handling › should handle 404 gracefully
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-flows.spec.js:211:5 › KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Error Handling › should handle 404 gracefully
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://unlovedproductions.com/nonexistent-page Call log: - navigating to "https://unlovedproductions.com/nonexistent-page", waiting until "networkidle"
210 | test.describe('Error Handling', () => { 211 | test('should handle 404 gracefully', async ({ page }) => { > 212 | const response = await page.goto('/nonexistent-page', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }); | ^ 213 | 214 | // Should either show 404 page or redirect 215 | // Status should be 404 or 200 (if redirected) at /home/ubuntu/KDP-Creator-Suite/tests/e2e/critical-flows.spec.js:212:35
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/critical-flows-KDP-Creator-11920-hould-handle-404-gracefully-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: KDP Creator Suite - Critical Flows › Error Handling › should handle network errors gracefully
